payload.text:
You don't have an active registration yet.

Tap the button below to register for the webinar.

Great! Let's register you for the webinar.

What's your full name?

Nice to meet you, John Smith!

What's your email address?
Got it! Now, what's your phone number?

Please confirm your details:

Name: John Smith
Email: john@example.com
Phone: +79991234567

Is everything correct?

You're all set! 🎉

You're registered for the webinar. We'll send you a reminder before the event.

Tap the menu button below if you need anything else.

You're registered as John Smith.

Are you sure you want to cancel your registration?

Your registration has been cancelled.

If you change your mind, you can always register again.
